title: Mespilus elliptica

intro: Mespilus elliptica, commonly known as the Chinese hawthorn or Chinese maythorn, is a deciduous shrub native to China, known for its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The health benefits of Mespilus elliptica include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Mespilus elliptica include teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support heart health and alleviate digestive issues.
